text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's finally starting... The first match of the Triple
Crown tour, a once in a lifetime race, is here.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Once I leave the waiting room, there will be no
turning back. My only option will be to stand at
the paddock...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: And win.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I know. Well then, it's time to shine.
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: There are so many people.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I knew what the Hopeful Stakes would be like,
but the Classics are in a league of their own...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It feels quite different, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Sky.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Those cheers sure were something, huh. Everyone
was super loud when you came out.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But then again, you are this year's top contender. They're really rooting for you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmph, of course. It would be strange if they weren't supporting me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yowza. Spoken like a true star. Sigh... Is this the difference between you and me?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I sure got the short end of the stick. Why do I
have to go against both you and Spe at the
Satsuki Sho in my debut year?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh? Special Week is here too?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's right! It's like all the big names are here. I'm
so overwhelmed!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Maybe this is too big for a little ol' nobody like me. Sniffle.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
How could a nobody make it all the way to such a
grand stage as this?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention how you've stayed fit and
well-adjusted the entire time.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nyahaha! Oh, King. You exaggerate.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmph. It's just the truth. But with all that said...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No matter what factors come into play, I, King
Halo, am taking first.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I need good results... and recognition.
